pricing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pricing.faq.0.q: What does the Free plan include?
pricing.faq.0.a: Free includes 10 automations/month, access to all AI tools, and 1 workspace. No credit card required.
pricing.faq.1.q: How many automations do I get on Pro?
pricing.faq.1.a: Unlimited automations on Pro and Enterprise. Only the Free plan is capped at 10/month.
pricing.faq.2.q: What are the integrations (n8n, Zapier, Make)?
pricing.faq.2.a: On Pro you can connect Gormaran to your automation workflows. Send outputs directly to your CRM, Slack, email, or other tools — no copy-paste needed.
pricing.faq.3.a: Yes, cancel anytime. No lock-in, no cancellation fees. Your plan automatically drops to Free.
pricing.faq.4.q: What is Enterprise and how do I access it?
pricing.faq.4.a: Enterprise includes white-label, API access, unlimited workspaces, and dedicated support. Contact us at hola@gormaran.io to speak with our team.
